flashcards.definition: Movement of H⁺ ions through ATP synthase to generate ATP.
An enzyme that uses the flow of H⁺ across a membrane to synthesize ATP.
Molecules (NADH, FADH₂) that shuttle high-energy electrons to the ETC.
Energy released by an exergonic reaction drives an endergonic one.
Diagram showing energy loss at each trophic level (approximately 90% lost as heat).
